name: News Aggregator API
description: Aggregated news from BBC, NYT, Reuters, TechCrunch, Hacker News, and Dev.to. Top stories, tech news, business news, and search.
long_description:
## Overview

Free News Aggregator API pulling content from BBC, NYT, Reuters, TechCrunch, Hacker News, and Dev.to. Get top stories, tech news, business news, and search articles — all from one unified endpoint. No upstream API keys required. Built on Cloudflare Workers with 5-minute caching.

## Key Features

- ✅ Top news from BBC, NYT, and Reuters
- ✅ Tech news from TechCrunch, Hacker News, and Dev.to
- ✅ Business news from Reuters and Bloomberg
- ✅ Full-text search via Hacker News API
- ✅ Trending Dev.to articles with tags and reactions

## Use Cases

- **News Dashboards**: Build a multi-source news aggregator UI
- **Content Discovery**: Find trending stories for content curation
- **Slack/Discord Bots**: Post daily top news to team channels
- **Research**: Search and collect news articles on specific topics
- **Mobile Apps**: Provide a unified news feed from multiple sources

## Quick Start

```
GET /top
```

Returns JSON array of top news articles with `title`, `url`, `source`, `published_at`, and `description`.

## Pricing

| Plan | Price | Requests/mo | Rate Limit |
|------|-------|-------------|------------|
| **Basic (FREE)** | $0 | 500 | 1/sec |
| Pro | $5.99 | 50,000 | 10/sec |
| Ultra | $14.99 | 500,000 | 50/sec |
| Mega | $49.99 | 2,000,000 | 100/sec |

Free tier includes all news sources and search. No credit card required.
